paragraph:
Velmoria's loyal opposition
The republic learns to (debate) without rancour, and to (accommodate) the (diverse)
LET THIS chapter (elucidate) a paradox. Fifteen years after the marshal fell, the surest sign of Velmoria's health is not its unity but its disagreement. The republic has learned to (debate) fiercely and (accommodate) the (diverse)—to let (converse) and (perverse) opinion alike find a voice, without letting argument (exacerbate) into the violence of old.
Under the marshal there had been no opposition, only a (posse) of yes-men terrified to (grouse). Dissent was (adverse) to survival; to (accuse) the great leader of anything was to (implicate) oneself in treason. He did not (debate); he (pontificate)d. He would (prevaricate), (equivocate), (obfuscate)—anything but answer a plain question plainly. His "parliament" met only to (vindicate) decrees already signed, a chamber whose sole function was to (placate) and (supplicate).
The new (discourse) is altogether different. The chamber is loud, even unruly, and the founders count this a virtue. Members (traverse) the whole range of opinion: some would (consolidate) state power, others (abnegate) it; some (advocate) largesse, others would (eradicate) every wasteful (clause) from the budget. They (reciprocate) sharp words, then shake hands. The (impasse) of one week becomes the (compromise) of the next. No one is asked to (abdicate) conviction, only to (communicate) it within the rules.
This year's great (debate) concerned the budget. The treasury, recovered from the marshal's plunder, faced a choice: how to (disburse) a modest surplus. One faction wished to (reimburse) the families the regime had robbed; another to (consolidate) reserves against future shock; a third to (propagate) new industry across the provinces. Each side marshalled its case with (finesse) rather than fury. They did not (deprecate) one another's motives or (impute) bad faith; they argued the merits, and let the vote (adjudicate).
The marshal's heirs, of course, sought to (exacerbate) the split. A demagogue rose to (accuse) the government of (defalcate)d funds, a charge as (abstruse) as it was false. He hoped to (inundate) the chamber with scandal, to (obfuscate) the real question and (relegate) reasoned argument to noise. But the auditors, (sedate) and (precise), produced the ledgers and (disabuse)d the public of the lie within a day. The (ruse) collapsed. To (prognosticate) the regime's fall on a fabricated fraud proved, in the end, a (perverse) miscalculation.
There is wisdom now in how the state handles its critics. It does not (liquidate) them or drive them to the status of (recluse). It does not (negate) their right to (carouse) in protest or to (grouse) in the press. The lesson of the marshal—who tried to (domesticate) every mind and (inculcate) a single creed—is that a free people cannot be (placate)d into silence forever; the pressure only builds until it bursts the (floodgate). Better to let dissent (diffuse) and (permeate) openly than to (immure) it until it explodes.
The land itself reflects the change. Where the marshal let the fields (desiccate) and the orchards rot, farmers now (lubricate) the old machinery, (incubate) new strains of seed, (propagate) and (variegate) their crops, and (irrigate) the dry (fosse)s that ring the capital. The work is (intricate) and unglamorous—soil to (masticate), herds to (domesticate), reserves to (aggregate)—but it has (consolidate)d a real prosperity, broad and (diverse) rather than hoarded at the top.
None of this is guaranteed to endure. A republic must constantly (delineate) the line between vigorous debate and corrosive rancour; let the (obverse) become the (inverse) and discourse curdles into civil war. The founders take care not to (celibate)ly wall off power, nor to let any office (procreate) a dynasty. They (demarcate) authority, (bifurcate) it where it grows too strong, and (mandate) that no leader may (consolidate) what the people have not freely given.
So Velmoria does not (deprecate) its own disagreements; it (celebrate)s them, within reason. The marshal sought to (eradicate) dissent and (consolidate) himself as the state's sole (muse). His country, fifteen years on, has chosen the (converse): to let a thousand quarrelsome voices (debate), to (accommodate) the (diverse), and to (vindicate)—daily, noisily, imperfectly—the simple proposition that free people governing themselves will always (traverse) a harder but truer road than any tyrant's smooth and (perverse) decree.
text:
本批词根亮点：

• -verse/-vert 大家族：averse/adverse/diverse/inverse/perverse/reverse/traverse/converse，全来自拉丁 vertere（转），前缀决定转向方向

• -fuse 大家族：defuse/diffuse/infuse/profuse/transfuse，全来自拉丁 fundere（浇/倒），infuse=浇入，transfuse=跨越浇=输血

• -cate 大家族（本批核心）：eradicate/abdicate/vindicate/placate/implicate/complicate/intricate，全来自拉丁 -care（做）或特定词根，-cate 是使役动词常见后缀

• eradicate：e（向外）+ radic（根，拉丁radix），连根拔出=根除，radical（根本的）/radish（萝卜）同根

• candidate：拉丁 candidatus（穿白袍的人），古罗马候选人穿白色托加袍=纯洁/无罪，candid（坦诚=白色）同根

• pontificate：pontifex（教皇/主教=桥的建造者），pontificate=像教皇一样发表权威意见，pont（桥）/ponytail（马尾辫）同根

• inculcate：in+calcare（踩踏），把知识踩进去=灌输，calculus（微积分=小石子）同根

• prevaricate：pre+varicare（叉开腿走路），左摇右摆=支吾其词，prevarication拐弯抹角

quiz.question: _____ verse
quiz.explanation: 诗句，无韵诗。Shakespeare wrote in blank verse. 莎士比亚用无韵诗写作。 | vers->转向（拉丁vertere），verse->转行的文字=诗句（cf. version版本，invert颠倒，convert转变，anniversary周年=转回同一天）

quiz.question: averse __ ____
quiz.explanation: 反对的，反对风险。Investors are averse to risk. 投资者反对风险。 | a->朝向/对抗，vers->转（拉丁），averse->转向反对=厌恶（cf. adverse不利，aversion厌恶，version版本，convert转变）

quiz.question: traverse ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 穿越，穿越沙漠。They had to traverse the desert. 他们不得不穿越沙漠。 | tra->横过，vers->转，traverse->横向穿越（cf. transverse横向，controversy争论=相互转，divert转移，adversity逆境）

quiz.question: ____'_ obverse
quiz.explanation: 正面，硬币的正面。The coin's obverse shows the president. 硬币的正面显示总统。 | ob->朝向，vers->转，obverse->面向观者的一面=正面（cf. reverse反面，converse交谈，adverse不利，inverse反向）

quiz.question: adverse ______
quiz.explanation: 不利的，不利的影响。The drug had an adverse effect. 这种药物有不利的影响。 | ad->朝向，vers->转，adverse->转向对抗=不利的（cf. adversity逆境，averse厌恶，adversary对手，advertise广告=转向注意）

quiz.question: reverse ____
quiz.explanation: 倒退，倒档。Put the car in reverse gear. 把车挂倒档。 | re->向后，vers->转，reverse->向后转=倒退（cf. revert恢复，irreversible不可逆，reversible可逆，obverse正面）

quiz.question: diverse ________
quiz.explanation: 多样的，多样的观众。The show attracted a diverse audience. 演出吸引了多样的观众。 | di->分开，vers->转，diverse->向不同方向转=多样的（cf. divert转移，diversity多样性，diverge分歧，diversion转移）

quiz.question: inverse ________
quiz.explanation: 逆向的，逆向函数。Calculate the inverse function. 计算逆向函数。 | in->向内，vers->转，inverse->向内转=逆向的（cf. invert颠倒，converse相反，reverse逆转，perverse乖张）

quiz.question: ______ converse
quiz.explanation: 交谈，随意交谈。They engaged in casual converse. 他们进行随意交谈。 | con->共同，vers->转，converse->共同转=交流（cf. conversation对话，convert转变，controversial争议，universe宇宙=转向统一）

quiz.question: perverse ________
quiz.explanation: 乖张的，乖张的行为。His perverse behavior was troubling. 他乖张的行为令人不安。 | per->彻底，vers->转，perverse->彻底转离正途=乖张的（cf. pervert歪曲，perverted扭曲，invert颠倒，adverse不利）

quiz.question: reimburse ________
quiz.explanation: 报销，报销费用。The company will reimburse expenses. 公司会报销费用。 | re->再次，im->进入，burs->钱包（拉丁bursa），reimburse->把钱再放回钱包=报销（cf. bursar财务主管，bursary奖学金，disburse支付）

quiz.question: disburse _____
quiz.explanation: 支付，支付资金。The treasurer would disburse funds. 财务主管会支付资金。 | dis->分开，burs->钱包，disburse->从钱包里分出=支付（cf. reimburse报销，bursar财务，purse钱包，bursary奖学金）

quiz.question: ____ recourse
quiz.explanation: 求助，寻求求助。They had to seek recourse to the law. 他们不得不寻求法律的求助。 | re->回，cours->跑（拉丁currere），recourse->跑回去求助（cf. course课程，discourse演讲，concourse广场，recur再发生）

quiz.question: _______ _ discourse
quiz.explanation: 演讲，发表演讲。The professor would deliver a discourse. 教授会发表演讲。 | dis->分开，cours->跑，discourse->把话跑向各处=讲演（cf. course课程，concourse汇合，intercourse交流，recourse求助）

quiz.question: purse ____
quiz.explanation: 噘嘴，噘嘴。She would purse lips in disapproval. 她会不满地噘嘴。 | bursa->钱袋（希腊），purse->像收紧钱袋口一样噘嘴（cf. bursar财务，disburse支付，reimburse报销，purse-strings控制财政）

quiz.question: _____ impasse
quiz.explanation: 僵局，陷入僵局。Negotiations would reach impasse. 谈判会陷入僵局。 | im->否定，passe->通道（法语passer->通过），impasse->无法通过=僵局（cf. pass通过，bypass绕过，surpass超过，trespass越界）

quiz.question: ________ largesse
quiz.explanation: 慷慨施舍，慷慨的施舍。The patron's generous largesse helped. 赞助人慷慨的施舍有所帮助。 | large->大（拉丁largus->慷慨），esse->状态，largesse->慷慨给予（cf. large大，enlarge扩大，largely大体上，largeness宏大）

quiz.question: ____ finesse
quiz.explanation: 技巧，展示技巧。The diplomat would show finesse. 外交官会展示技巧。 | fin->精细（法语fin->精致），esse->状态，finesse->精细的技巧（cf. fine精细，finish完成，final最终，finite有限，define定义）

quiz.question: _________ fosse
quiz.explanation: 壕沟，防御壕沟。They dug a defensive fosse. 他们挖了防御壕沟。 | fossa->坑（拉丁fodere->挖），fosse->防御壕沟（cf. fossil化石=被挖出来的，fossil fuel化石燃料，ditch沟渠，moat护城河）

quiz.question: _______'_ posse
quiz.explanation: 一队人，警长的一队人。The sheriff's posse tracked the outlaws. 警长的一队人追踪歹徒。 | posse->能力/一队人（拉丁posse->能够），posse->有权力追捕的团队（cf. possible可能，possess拥有，power权力，potent强大）

quiz.question: ________ clause
quiz.explanation: 条款，合同条款。Read the contract clause carefully. 仔细阅读合同条款。 | clausa->关闭的（拉丁clausula->小结尾），clause->语句的结尾=条款（cf. close关闭，include包括，exclude排除，enclose围住）

quiz.question: disabuse __ ______
quiz.explanation: 纠正，纠正观念。I must disabuse of notion. 我必须纠正这个观念。 | dis->去除，abuse->滥用（拉丁），disabuse->去除错误使用=纠正误解（cf. abuse滥用，misuse误用，correct纠正，enlighten启发）

quiz.question: accuse __ _____
quiz.explanation: 指控，指控欺诈。They would accuse of fraud. 他们会指控欺诈。 | ac->朝向，cus->理由（拉丁causa），accuse->指出理由=指控（cf. cause原因，because因为，excuse借口，recuse回避）

quiz.question: defuse _______
quiz.explanation: 缓和，缓和紧张。Humor can defuse tension. 幽默可以缓和紧张。 | de->去除，fuse->导火线（拉丁fusus），defuse->去除导火线=缓和（cf. fuse保险丝，infuse注入，diffuse散射，profuse大量）

quiz.question: diffuse _____
quiz.explanation: 散射，散射光线。The curtain would diffuse light. 窗帘会散射光线。 | di->分开，fuse->倒（拉丁fundere），diffuse->向四周倒=散射（cf. infuse注入，profuse大量，transfuse输血，defuse缓和，refuse拒绝）

quiz.question: infuse ______
quiz.explanation: 注入，注入能量。The speech would infuse energy. 演讲会注入能量。 | in->进入，fuse->倒（拉丁fundere），infuse->向内倒入=注入（cf. diffuse散射，profuse大量，transfuse输血，refuse拒绝，confuse混淆）

quiz.question: profuse ________
quiz.explanation: 大量的，大量出血。The wound caused profuse bleeding. 伤口造成大量出血。 | pro->向前，fuse->倒（拉丁fundere），profuse->向前大量倒出=大量的（cf. profusion大量，diffuse散射，infuse注入，transfuse输血）

quiz.question: transfuse _____
quiz.explanation: 输血，输血。Doctors had to transfuse blood. 医生不得不输血。 | trans->跨越，fuse->倒，transfuse->跨越倒入=输血（cf. infuse注入，diffuse散射，profuse大量，transfusion输血，transfer转移）

quiz.question: _________ recluse
quiz.explanation: 隐士，孤僻的隐士。He became a withdrawn recluse. 他成了孤僻的隐士。 | re->回，clus->关闭（拉丁claudere），recluse->关在里面不出来=隐士（cf. reclude隐居，include包含，exclude排除，close关闭，cloister修道院）

quiz.question: muse __ ____
quiz.explanation: 沉思，沉思人生。He would muse on life's meaning. 他会沉思人生的意义。 | muse->沉思（古法语muser->凝视），muse->沉思/缪斯女神（cf. museum博物馆=缪斯之地，amuse娱乐，music音乐，muse沉思）

quiz.question: hypotenuse ______
quiz.explanation: 斜边，斜边长度。Calculate the hypotenuse length. 计算斜边长度。 | hypo->在下，ten->伸展（希腊teinein），hypotenuse->在下方延伸的边=斜边（cf. hypothesis假设，hypocrite伪君子，tendon肌腱）

quiz.question: _____ warehouse
quiz.explanation: 仓库，大型仓库。They stored goods in a large warehouse. 他们在大型仓库储存货物。 | ware->商品（古英语waru），house->房子，warehouse->存放商品的房子=仓库（cf. ware商品，software软件，hardware硬件，aware意识到）

quiz.question: espouse _ _____
quiz.explanation: 支持，支持事业。He would espouse a cause passionately. 他会热情地支持事业。 | es->使，spouse->配偶（拉丁sponsus->承诺者），espouse->像娶妻一样全力支持（cf. spouse配偶，sponsor赞助人，respond回应，responsible负责）

quiz.question: carouse ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 狂欢，整夜狂欢。They would carouse all night. 他们会整夜狂欢。 | garaus->全部喝光（德语），carouse->尽兴狂饮=狂欢（cf. carousel旋转木马=马上狂欢，carousal狂欢，revel狂欢，revelry欢闹）

quiz.question: grouse ____
quiz.explanation: 松鸡，松鸡狩猎。They went on a grouse hunt. 他们去松鸡狩猎。 | grouse->松鸡（来源不明，可能来自法语gelinotte），grouse->也表示抱怨（cf. grumble抱怨，grouch牢骚，complain抱怨）

quiz.question: souse _______
quiz.explanation: 腌制，腌制鲱鱼。They would souse herring in brine. 他们会在盐水中腌制鲱鱼。 | souse->腌制（古法语souz->盐水），souse->用盐水浸泡腌制（cf. sauce调料，salty咸，brine盐水，pickle腌制）

quiz.question: ______ ruse
quiz.explanation: 计谋，巧妙的计谋。It was a clever ruse. 这是巧妙的计谋。 | ruser->绕道（法语），ruse->绕道欺骗的计谋（cf. wile诡计，stratagem计谋，subterfuge诡计，ploy策略，maneuver机动）

quiz.question: abstruse ______
quiz.explanation: 深奥的，深奥的理论。The abstruse theory confused students. 深奥的理论让学生困惑。 | abs->离开，trus->推（拉丁trudere），abstruse->被推开=深奥难懂的（cf. extrude挤出，intrude侵入，obtrude强加，protrude突出）

quiz.question: browse ___ ___
quiz.explanation: 浏览，浏览网页。She would browse the web for hours. 她会浏览网页数小时。 | brout->嫩芽（古法语），browse->像动物啃嫩芽=随意翻看（cf. graze放牧，nibble啃，browse浏览，web browser网页浏览器）

quiz.question: debate ____
quiz.explanation: 辩论，辩论队。She joined the debate team. 她加入了辩论队。 | de->强调，bat->打（法语battre->打），debate->互相打击=辩论（cf. battle战斗，combat战斗，abate减弱，battery殴打）

quiz.question: ___ rebate
quiz.explanation: 回扣，税收回扣。They received a tax rebate. 他们收到了税收回扣。 | re->回，bate->打击（古法语battre），rebate->打回去的钱=回扣（cf. debate辩论，abate减少，bat球棒，battery蓄电池）

quiz.question: celibate ______
quiz.explanation: 独身的，独身的牧师。The celibate priest took vows. 独身的牧师宣誓。 | caelebs->独身者（拉丁），celibate->保持独身的（cf. celibacy独身，bachelor单身汉，chastity贞洁，vow誓言）

quiz.question: _____ reprobate
quiz.explanation: 堕落者，彻底的堕落者。He was an utter reprobate. 他是彻底的堕落者。 | re->再次，prob->测试（拉丁probare），reprobate->被再次测试后被拒绝的=堕落者（cf. probe探查，approve批准，proof证明，probation试用期）

quiz.question: exacerbate ________
quiz.explanation: 加剧，加剧紧张。The incident would exacerbate tensions. 这起事件会加剧紧张。 | ex->使，acerb->苦（拉丁acerbus->苦涩），exacerbate->使苦上加苦=加剧（cf. acerbic尖刻，acrimony尖酸，acrid刺激性，exacerbation加剧）

quiz.question: incubate ____
quiz.explanation: 孵化，孵化蛋。The hen would incubate eggs. 母鸡会孵化蛋。 | in->在上，cub->躺（拉丁cubare->躺），incubate->躺在上面=孵化（cf. succumb屈服=躺倒，incumbent在职者=躺在位子上，cubicle小隔间）

quiz.question: placate ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 安抚，安抚人群。He tried to placate the crowd. 他试图安抚人群。 | plac->令人愉快（拉丁placere），placate->使愉快=安抚（cf. placid平静，complacent自满，placebo安慰剂，please取悦，implacable无法平息）

quiz.question: desiccate _____
quiz.explanation: 使干燥，使水果干燥。Sun would desiccate fruit. 阳光会使水果干燥。 | de->彻底，sicc->干（拉丁siccus->干），desiccate->使彻底干燥（cf. siccative干燥剂，arid干旱，desiccant干燥剂，exsiccate弄干）

quiz.question: deprecate ________
quiz.explanation: 反对，反对暴力。We must deprecate violence. 我们必须反对暴力。 | de->反对，prec->祈祷（拉丁precari），deprecate->用祈祷反对=强烈反对（cf. depreciate贬值，prayer祈祷，imprecate诅咒，imprecation诅咒）

quiz.question: eradicate _______
quiz.explanation: 根除，根除疾病。Vaccines help eradicate disease. 疫苗帮助根除疾病。 | e->向外，radic->根（拉丁radix），eradicate->连根拔出=根除（cf. radical根本，radish萝卜，radix词根，irradicate无法根除）

quiz.question: abdicate ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 退位，退王位。The king would abdicate the throne. 国王会退王位。 | ab->离开，dic->说（拉丁dicere），abdicate->发言离开=退位/放弃（cf. indicate指示，dedicate奉献，adjudicate裁决，predict预测）

quiz.question: medicate _ _____
quiz.explanation: 用药，给伤口用药。Clean and medicate a wound. 清洁并给伤口用药。 | medic->医生（拉丁），ate->使，medicate->用药治疗（cf. medicine药物，medic医护，remedy补救，medication药物治疗）

quiz.question: indicate _ _____
quiz.explanation: 表明，表明趋势。The data indicate a trend. 数据表明趋势。 | in->向，dic->说/指（拉丁dicere），indicate->指向=表明（cf. indicate指出，index指数，indict起诉，dictate命令，predict预测）

quiz.question: vindicate ______
quiz.explanation: 证明正当，证明权利正当。The ruling would vindicate rights. 裁决会证明权利正当。 | vind->索赔/维护（拉丁vindicare），icate->使，vindicate->维护正当（cf. avenge复仇，vengeance复仇，vindictive报复性，avindicate辩护）

quiz.question: adjudicate _______
quiz.explanation: 裁决，裁决争端。The court will adjudicate dispute. 法院将裁决争端。 | ad->朝向，judic->判断（拉丁judex->法官），adjudicate->朝向法官=裁决（cf. judge法官，judicial司法，prejudice偏见，injudicious不明智）

quiz.question: pontificate _________
quiz.explanation: 武断地说教，傲慢地武断地说教。He would pontificate pompously. 他会傲慢地武断地说教。 | pontifex->桥的建造者（拉丁pons+facere），教皇=最高祭司=桥的建造者，pontificate->像教皇一样发话（cf. pont桥，pontoon浮桥，Ponte Vecchio老桥）

quiz.question: delicate _______
quiz.explanation: 微妙的，微妙的平衡。Maintain a delicate balance. 保持微妙的平衡。 | delic->引诱（拉丁delicatus->享乐的），delicate->令人享乐的=精致微妙的（cf. delicious美味，delight喜悦，delicacy美味/微妙）

quiz.question: implicate __ _____
quiz.explanation: 牵连，牵连欺诈。Evidence would implicate him in fraud. 证据会让他牵连欺诈。 | im->进入，plic->折叠（拉丁plicare），implicate->折叠进去=牵涉其中（cf. complicate使复杂，explicit明确，duplicate复制，implication含义）

quiz.question: complicate ______
quiz.explanation: 使复杂化，使事情复杂化。Don't complicate matter further. 不要进一步使事情复杂化。 | com->共同，plic->折叠，complicate->折叠在一起=使复杂（cf. implicate牵涉，explicit明确，intricate复杂，duplicate复制）

quiz.question: supplicate ___
quiz.explanation: 恳求，恳求上帝。They would supplicate God for mercy. 他们会恳求上帝宽恕。 | sup->在下，plic->折叠（拉丁），supplicate->跪倒折叠=恳求（cf. supple柔软，comply遵守，supplication恳求，humble谦卑=跪倒）

quiz.question: explicate _ ______
quiz.explanation: 阐明，阐明理论。The professor would explicate a theory. 教授会阐明理论。 | ex->向外，plic->折叠，explicate->展开折叠=阐明（cf. explain解释，explicit明确，complicate复杂，implicate牵涉，duplicate复制）

quiz.question: communicate _______
quiz.explanation: 沟通，清楚地沟通。Always communicate clearly. 始终清楚地沟通。 | com->共同，mun->服务（拉丁munus），communicate->共同分享=沟通（cf. community社区，commune公社，immunity免疫，municipal市政）

quiz.question: prevaricate __ _____
quiz.explanation: 支吾其词，在回答中支吾其词。Don't prevaricate in reply. 不要在回答中支吾其词。 | pre->提前，varic->叉开腿（拉丁varicare），prevaricate->叉开腿走路=拐弯抹角（cf. varicose静脉曲张=叉开的，prevarication支吾，equivocate含糊）

quiz.question: lubricate _____
quiz.explanation: 润滑，润滑齿轮。Regularly lubricate gears. 定期润滑齿轮。 | lubric->滑（拉丁lubricus->滑），lubricate->使滑=润滑（cf. lubricious轻浮/滑溜，lubricant润滑剂，slippery滑，lubrication润滑）

quiz.question: intricate _______
quiz.explanation: 复杂的，复杂的图案。The carpet had an intricate pattern. 地毯有复杂的图案。 | in->进入，tric->障碍（拉丁tricae->纠纷），intricate->充满内部障碍的=复杂的（cf. extricate解脱，intricacy复杂，complicated复杂）

quiz.question: masticate ____
quiz.explanation: 咀嚼，咀嚼食物。Chew and masticate food thoroughly. 充分咀嚼食物。 | masticare->咀嚼（拉丁，来自希腊masasthai），masticate->用臼齿咀嚼（cf. mastic乳香脂，masticate咀嚼，molar臼齿，jaw下巴）

quiz.question: domesticate _______
quiz.explanation: 驯养，驯养动物。Humans learned to domesticate animals. 人类学会了驯养动物。 | domus->家（拉丁），domesticate->使成为家里的=驯养（cf. domestic家庭，domicile住所，dome穹顶，major-domo大总管）

quiz.question: prognosticate ____
quiz.explanation: 预言，预言厄运。Prophets would prognosticate doom. 先知会预言厄运。 | pro->向前，gnos->知道（希腊），ticate->使，prognosticate->提前知道=预言（cf. prognosis预后，diagnosis诊断，agnostic不可知，cognition认知）

quiz.question: intoxicate ____ ____
quiz.explanation: 使陶醉，用酒使陶醉。Don't intoxicate with wine. 不要用酒使陶醉。 | in->进入，toxic->毒（希腊toxikon->毒药），intoxicate->注入毒素=使陶醉（cf. toxic毒性，antidote解毒剂，toxin毒素，detoxify解毒）

quiz.question: defalcate _____
quiz.explanation: 挪用公款，挪用公款资金。The accountant would defalcate funds. 会计会挪用公款资金。 | de->去除，falc->镰刀（拉丁falx），defalcate->用镰刀割走=侵吞（cf. falcon猎鹰=镰刀形爪，falcate镰刀形，embezzle挪用，misappropriate）

quiz.question: inculcate ______
quiz.explanation: 灌输，灌输价值观。Parents inculcate values in children. 父母给孩子灌输价值观。 | in->进入，culc->踩（拉丁calcare->踩），inculcate->踩进去=灌输（cf. calculus微积分=小石子，calculate计算，calcium钙=石灰）

quiz.question: dislocate ________
quiz.explanation: 使脱臼，使肩膀脱臼。The fall would dislocate shoulder. 跌倒会使肩膀脱臼。 | dis->分开，loc->地方（拉丁locus），dislocate->使离开原位=脱臼（cf. locate定位，location位置，locus焦点，relocate重新定位）

quiz.question: reciprocate ________
quiz.explanation: 回报，回报善意。She would reciprocate kindness. 她会回报善意。 | reciproc->来回（拉丁reciprocus->来回），reciprocate->来回=回报（cf. reciprocal互惠，reciprocity互惠，mutual相互，bilateral双边）

quiz.question: ______ advocate
quiz.explanation: 倡导者，公众倡导者。He became a public advocate. 他成为公众倡导者。 | ad->朝向，voc->声音（拉丁vocare），advocate->呼唤支持=倡导者（cf. vocal声音，invoke调用，evoke唤起，provoke激怒，vocation职业）

quiz.question: equivocate __
quiz.explanation: 含糊其辞，对...含糊其辞。Don't equivocate on the issue. 不要对这个问题含糊其辞。 | equi->相等，voc->声音（拉丁），equivocate->两种声音都相等=含糊其辞（cf. equivocal模棱两可，ambiguous模糊，prevaricate支吾）

quiz.question: demarcate ________
quiz.explanation: 划定界限，划定界限边界。The treaty would demarcate boundary. 条约会划定界限边界。 | de->彻底，marc->标记（法语marque），demarcate->彻底标记=划定（cf. mark标记，remark评论，remarkable值得注意，landmark地标）

quiz.question: bifurcate ____
quiz.explanation: 分叉，分叉成。The road would bifurcate into two paths. 道路会分叉成两条路。 | bi->二，furc->叉（拉丁furca），bifurcate->分成两叉（cf. fork叉子，bifurcation分叉，binary二进制，binocular双目镜）

quiz.question: obfuscate ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 使混淆，使问题混淆。Don't obfuscate the issue. 不要使问题混淆。 | ob->使，fusc->暗（拉丁fuscus->深色），obfuscate->使变暗=混淆（cf. fuscous深褐色，obscure晦涩，confuse混淆，bewilder困惑）

quiz.question: coruscate ____ ___
quiz.explanation: 闪耀，以机智闪耀。His remarks would coruscate with wit. 他的言论会以机智闪耀。 | corusc->闪光（拉丁coruscare->闪光），coruscate->闪闪发光（cf. oscillate振荡，scintillate闪烁，iridescent彩虹色，glitter闪光）

quiz.question: sedate ______
quiz.explanation: 沉着的，沉着的举止。He had a sedate manner. 他有沉着的举止。 | sed->坐（拉丁sedere），sedate->坐着不动的=沉着的（cf. sediment沉积，preside主持，reside居住，sedentary久坐，assess评估）

quiz.question: antedate ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 早于，早于事件。These ruins antedate the event. 这些遗迹早于事件。 | ante->之前，dat->日期（拉丁datum），antedate->日期在之前=早于（cf. date日期，postdate晚于，update更新，antecedent先例）

quiz.question: elucidate _______
quiz.explanation: 阐明，阐明概念。Let me elucidate concept further. 让我进一步阐明概念。 | e->向外，lucid->光（拉丁lux），elucidate->带出光明=阐明（cf. lucid清晰，translucent半透明，illuminate照亮，pellucid清澈）

quiz.question: _________ candidate
quiz.explanation: 候选人，政治候选人。The political candidate campaigned hard. 政治候选人努力竞选。 | candidatus->穿白袍的（拉丁candidus->白色），candidate->穿白袍的候选人（cf. candid坦诚=白色，incandescent白炽，candle蜡烛）

quiz.question: consolidate _____
quiz.explanation: 巩固，巩固权力。The leader would consolidate power. 领导者会巩固权力。 | con->共同，solid->固（拉丁solidus），consolidate->使共同坚固=巩固（cf. solid固体，solidarity团结，solidify固化，solidity坚固）

quiz.question: liquidate ______
quiz.explanation: 清算，清算资产。The company had to liquidate assets. 公司不得不清算资产。 | liquid->液体（拉丁liquidus），ate->使，liquidate->使变成流动性=清算（cf. liquid流动，liquor酒，liquify液化，liquidation清算）

quiz.question: __________ mandate
quiz.explanation: 授权，政府授权。The government mandate was clear. 政府授权很明确。 | man->手（拉丁manus），dat->给（拉丁dare），mandate->手交出去=授权（cf. command命令，demand要求，remand羁押，reprimand训斥）

quiz.question: inundate ____ ________
quiz.explanation: 淹没，被请求淹没。They would inundate with requests. 他们会被请求淹没。 | in->进入，und->波浪（拉丁unda），inundate->波浪涌入=淹没（cf. undulate波动，abound充满，redund多余，abundant充足）

quiz.question: accommodate _____
quiz.explanation: 容纳，容纳需求。We can accommodate needs. 我们可以容纳需求。 | ac->使，commod->合适（拉丁commodus），accommodate->使合适=容纳（cf. commodity商品，commodious宽敞，mode模式，modify修改）

quiz.question: nucleate _______
quiz.explanation: 成核，成核沸腾。Nucleate boiling occurs in the pot. 成核沸腾在锅中发生。 | nucle->核（拉丁nucleus->果核），ate->形成，nucleate->形成核心（cf. nucleus核，nuclear核的，nucleic核的，denuclearize去核化）

quiz.question: permeate ___ ___
quiz.explanation: 渗透，渗透空气。The scent would permeate the air. 香味会渗透空气。 | per->彻底，me->过（拉丁meare->流过），permeate->彻底流过=渗透（cf. permeable可渗透，impermeable不透，semipermeable半透）

quiz.question: delineate __________
quiz.explanation: 描绘，描绘边界。Clearly delineate boundaries. 清楚地描绘边界。 | de->彻底，line->线（拉丁linea），delineate->用线彻底描绘（cf. line线，linear线性，outline轮廓，underline下划线，lineage血统）

quiz.question: procreate _______
quiz.explanation: 繁殖，快速繁殖。Some species procreate quickly. 一些物种快速繁殖。 | pro->向前，cre->创造（拉丁creare），procreate->向前创造=繁殖（cf. create创造，recreate娱乐，procreation繁殖，creature生物）

quiz.question: nauseate _______
quiz.explanation: 使恶心，使观众恶心。The graphic scenes would nauseate viewers. 血腥场景会使观众恶心。 | naus->船（希腊naus），nausea->晕船=恶心（cf. nautical海上，nausea恶心，astronaut宇航员，nautilus鹦鹉螺）

quiz.question: propagate ______
quiz.explanation: 繁殖，繁殖植物。Learn to propagate plants from cuttings. 学习从插条繁殖植物。 | pro->向前，pag->固定（拉丁pagus->地方），propagate->向前固定生长=繁殖（cf. propaganda宣传，page页面，propagation传播）

quiz.question: divagate ____ _____
quiz.explanation: 离题，离题。Don't divagate from topic. 不要离题。 | di->分开，vag->漫游（拉丁vagari），divagate->离开漫游=离题（cf. vagabond流浪，vague模糊，extravagant奢侈，digress离题）

quiz.question: ____ floodgate
quiz.explanation: 水闸，打开水闸。This decision will open floodgate. 这个决定会打开水闸。 | flood->洪水，gate->门，floodgate->控制洪水的门=水闸（cf. flood洪水，gate门，watergate水闸/水门事件，floodgate打开先例）

quiz.question: variegate ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 使多样化，使花园多样化。Various flowers variegate the garden. 各种花使花园多样化。 | vari->变化（拉丁varius），gate->使，variegate->使多样化（cf. various各种，vary变化，variety多样，variable变量，variegated多色的）

quiz.question: relegate __ _______
quiz.explanation: 降级，降级到次要位置。They would relegate to seconds. 他们会降级到次要位置。 | re->回，leg->送（拉丁legare），relegate->送回去=降级（cf. delegate委托，delegate代表，legacy遗产，legate大使，legislation立法）

quiz.question: negate ________
quiz.explanation: 否定，否定论点。Evidence would negate argument. 证据会否定论点。 | neg->否认（拉丁negare），negate->否定（cf. negative否定，deny否认，nullify使无效，renege违背，renegade叛徒）

quiz.question: abnegate ____
quiz.explanation: 放弃，放弃自我。Saints would abnegate self. 圣人会放弃自我。 | ab->离开，neg->否认，abnegate->否认离开=放弃（cf. negate否定，deny否认，renounce放弃，abdicate退位，self-denial自我否定）

quiz.question: aggregate ______
quiz.explanation: 总计，总需求。Economists study aggregate demand. 经济学家研究总需求。 | ag->朝向，greg->群（拉丁grex），aggregate->聚集成群=总计（cf. congregate集合，segregate隔离，gregarious爱交际，egregious极端的=离群的）
